miwi        2008-02-16 08:56:01 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    mail/vacation        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  This is a port of vacation which is an email autoresponder commonly
  used when taking a vacation / holiday / leave of absence.
  
  WWW: http://www.linux.it/~md/software/
  
  PR:             ports/120309
  Submitted by:   Adam McDougall <mcdouga9 at egr.msu.edu>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.890     +1 -0      ports/mail/Makefile

  1.1       +3 -0      ports/mail/vacation/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/mail/vacation/pkg-descr (new)
